violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth bucket sanitizer concentration too low at bar.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Bar cutting boards and counters have trapped/stagnant water and need immediate cleaning/sanitizing.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Containers used to store utensils and kitchen equipment have an accumulation of food debris and need to be cleaned.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Ice machine drain line moved from drain. Draining onto floor and pooling along wall juncture.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand sinks at bar, BOH prep area, & service alley missing hand soap dispensers.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pooling water under ice machine.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Multiple damaged wall areas in kitchen. Close holes in walls. Replace ceiling tiles that have been removed. Water damaged wall near ice machine.
